Content prompt 1/3: 'The DOJ just extended the ADA Title II deadline by one year — here's what that actually changes (and what it doesn't) for teams using AI to build government UIs.' LinkedIn post with a compliance timeline graphic. Anchor: Federal Register Interim Final Rule effective April 20 2026. Key angle: the WCAG 2.1 AA requirement is unchanged; only the clock moved. Good for government sector and govtech audience.

Content prompt 2/3: 'A 2026 peer-reviewed paper used an LLM to restructure HTML in real time and blind users rated it significantly better — this is the other side of the AI-accessibility story.' LinkedIn post summarising arXiv 2502.18701. Key angle: counternarrative to the AI-generates-broken-UIs story; AI as a repair layer is emerging as a research direction.

Content prompt 3/3: 'W3C COGA just published its first research module on AI voice interfaces and cognitive accessibility — four questions it forces product teams to answer.' Post anchored to W3C WAI news 2026-02-05. Key angle: first W3C document directly addressing cognitive disability requirements for LLM-powered chat and voice UIs; pre-normative but citable now.

Content prompt 1/3: 'The FTC just fined an AI accessibility overlay $1M for claiming full WCAG compliance in 48 hours. Here's what regulators said was false — and what it means for every AI tool making accessibility guarantees.' LinkedIn post anchored to the FTC accessiBe action finalised April 24 2025. Angle: first federal enforcement against an AI overlay vendor; what compliance claims are legally defensible vs. not.

Content prompt 2/3: '87% of screen reader users hit AI interface failures every week. The data is getting harder to ignore — here are the three WCAG criteria AI-generated UIs fail most often.' LinkedIn/X post aggregating the BRICS Econ May 2026 statistics: 73% bad alt text, 87% weekly AT failures, 63% task failure rate. Angle: these are the most citable data points yet for quantifying AI accessibility debt.

Content prompt 3/3: 'The European Accessibility Act is now enforced. French disability groups issued legal notices to 4 grocers within days of the June 2025 deadline. Here is what EN 301 549 means for teams shipping AI-powered products into the EU.' LinkedIn post with enforcement timeline graphic. Angle: EAA/EN 301 549 is live enforcement territory now, not a future compliance target.
